.nav-files-container.background: rgb(42, 42, 42) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)) no-repeat scroll 100% 1px / 11.88px padding-box border-box, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) url("app://obsidian.md/public/images/6155340132a851f6089e.svg") no-repeat scroll 100% 1px / 11.88px padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgb(255, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(37, 37, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
